job.title: Experienced C# / Angular Developer M/F
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: Join our team in Avignon to develop modern web applications C#/Angular. You work at client sites on a time-and-materials or fixed-price basis on stimulating projects.
mission.1: Développer des applications .NET Core et Angular
mission.2: Concevoir et implémenter des API REST
mission.3: Rédiger les tests unitaires et fonctionnels
mission.4: Participer aux cérémonies Agile (sprint planning, daily, rétrospective)
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in informatique
profile.2: 3 to 6 years of experience C# et Angular
profile.3: Proficiency in .NET Core, TypeScript, SQL Server
